subcodes.first_line: Thou knowest, O my God, the extent of my love, the intensity of my yearning, the magnitude of my affection, and the depth of my attachment to the boughs of the Divine Lote-Tree [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انت تعلم یا الهی مبلغ حبی و فرط هیامی و عظیم ودادی و شده تعلقی بافنان سدره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for pilgrims, @review of publications, @call to action, @exhortations and counsels
